name: access_control
description: an RBAC access-request state machine world; actions request, approve, grant, revoke

card.description: an RBAC access-request state machine world; actions request, approve, grant, revoke

rules: An access request follows the lifecycle idle -> requested -> approved -> granted -> revoked.
'request' opens a new request for a (user, role) only when no request is in flight (status idle, revoked, or denied), and the role must exist in the role catalogue.
'approve' succeeds only on a 'requested' request and only if the approver holds a role granting the 'approve' permission; otherwise the request is denied.
'grant' applies only to an 'approved' request and assigns the requested role to the requesting user.
'revoke' applies only to a 'granted' request and removes the assigned role from the user.
Every successful action appends an entry to the immutable history audit trail.

emit.report: Access request is '{status}'. Current request: {request}. Role assignments: {assignments}.

objectives.name: least_privilege
objectives.goal: minimize roles assigned beyond what was approved

objectives.name: approval_integrity
objectives.goal: no role is granted without a prior valid approval

objectives.name: auditability
objectives.goal: maximize completeness of the history audit trail
